title: Leboncoin Scraper
description: Scrape Leboncoin listings (real estate, cars, classifieds) from any search URL

urls_list.title: Search URLs *
urls_list.description: Enter one or more Leboncoin search URLs (must contain /recherche in the path). Category URLs (e.g. /cl/...) are not supported. This field is required.
urls_list.sectionDescription: Scrape one or multiple searches in a single run

max_pages.title: Max pages
max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape. Set 0 to scrape all available pages (practical limit of 99999 pages). Recommended: 10-20 to start.

limit_per_page.title: Ads per page
limit_per_page.description: Number of ads to scrape per page (Leboncoin typically displays 35 ads/page)

delay_between_pages.title: Delay between pages (seconds)
delay_between_pages.description: Wait time between each page (0 = maximum speed recommended). Note: setting a delay disables parallel fetching and scrapes pages one by one.

concurrency.title: Concurrency (parallel pages)
concurrency.description: Number of pages to fetch in parallel for much faster runs. Each worker uses an isolated session and a separate rotating proxy IP. Leave empty for a smart default (8 with a proxy, 3 without). Ignored when a per-page delay or max ad age is set.

max_age_days.title: Max ad age (days)
max_age_days.description: Ignore ads older than X days (0 = disabled)

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy used to reach Leboncoin. Apify Proxy with FR residential IPs is enabled by default and is REQUIRED to get past Leboncoin's Datadome anti-bot - disabling it will cause every run to be blocked.
